text.title: AI Option Cost Grid — Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the AI option cost grid: rows[] (option_name + metrics) + eval_set_hash + recommendation + sign-off metadata.

antipattern.description: Any cell value is literal "TBD" / "lorem ipsum" / "<fill>".
antipattern.reason: Violates r1-no-tbd; placeholders ship to client and erode trust.
The grid exists to compare options; one row is not a comparison.

antipattern.description: eval_set_hash absent OR mismatched with the eval set on disk.
antipattern.reason: Quality scores are unattributable without the eval anchor.

example.note: Invalid: TBDs present, fewer than 2 rows, no eval_set_hash, no decision_owner, no last_reviewed.

list.item: eval_set_hash matches eval set on disk.
